Nurse Emily needs to prepare a total of 3 writing prompts per group, and there are 4 groups. This means she needs to prepare $ 4 \times 3 = 12 $ initial prompts. Additionally, she has 10 extra prompts that will be shared equally among all the groups, which means each group will receive $ \frac{10}{4} = 2.5 $ prompts. Since the number of prompts must be a whole number, Emily will distribute 2 extra prompts to each group, totaling $ 4 \times 2 = 8 $ extra prompts. Therefore, the total number of writing prompts Emily needs to prepare is $ 12 + 8 = 20 $.

The library provides a variety of resources that can support the creative writing process, and the library also serves as a place where residents can access additional materials to enhance their writing. The library is an essential resource for supporting the therapeutic benefits of the workshop.

The END.
